description: Analytically constructed pre-accident telemetry sequence from INSAG-7 documented values and RBMK kinetics. rbmk_sim cannot reproduce 7% power state (design boundary — simulator built for small perturbations around nominal full power). 27 timesteps at dt=10s (270s total). Hard stop at 01:23:30, one step before AZ-5 scram.
method: Analytical construction from INSAG-7 + RBMK kinetics
stop_reason: Hard stop at t=270s (01:23:30) — before AZ-5 scram at 01:23:40
simulator_note: rbmk_sim xenon_pit scenario attempted but produces <2% power deviation from nominal — insufficient for 7% power state. Analytical construction used. Documented as simulator design boundary, not a defect.
window_length_note: Training window T=721 at dt=1s (~12 min). Chernobyl sequence T=27 at dt=10s (4.5 min). Direct anomaly scoring not performed due to window-length incompatibility. USAD and TF-AE use fixed-length decoders (T=721 required). SHAP attribution reported for LSTM-AE and GRU-ED only (variable-T compatible) on 261-point resampled input.
scope_exclusions: AZ-5 scram and subsequent power excursion

channel_uncertainty.CH03: Estimated from low-power coolant. Moderate uncertainty.
channel_uncertainty.CH04: Derived from CH03 via alpha_void. Moderate uncertainty.
channel_uncertainty.CH05: INSAG-7 xenon worth ~890 pcm. Low-moderate uncertainty.
channel_uncertainty.CH06: Estimated from xenon pit kinetics. Moderate uncertainty.
channel_uncertainty.CH07: Estimated from iodine depletion. Moderate uncertainty.
channel_uncertainty.CH08: Estimated from low-power fuel temp. Moderate uncertainty.
channel_uncertainty.CH09: Computed as reactivity residual — HIGH uncertainty.
channel_uncertainty.CH10: Derived from CH08 via alpha_doppler. Moderate uncertainty.

sources.use: Power level, xenon worth, ORM, operating conditions at 01:19:00
Cross-check anchor points curves A and B
sources.note: Model reconstruction figure, not primary instrument data

claims_excluded: No prevention or counterfactual safety claim is made.
Sequence used qualitatively to illustrate model behaviour only.
